series_metadata.series_title: Criminal Justice Network Manager Administration File
series_metadata.series_description: Reports on the downtime and problems on the OCJN sysstem copies of operations logs indicating those problems, copies of purchas ing documents for new, replacement, or additional equipment for the system, status reports of purchase requests and system upgrades, along with Problem Logs, copies of proposed tables of organization, proposed personnel upgrades or changes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year, then transfer to the State Records Center for 4 years then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
